data.name: 蕾貝卡與謎之魔劍
data.detailed_description:
✤故事✤

女戰士蕾貝卡從盜賊團中拯救了村莊後，便和溫柔的丈夫與兒子三人一同在村莊裡過上了平穩的生活。
某天，蕾貝卡從公會那邊接到了某個委託。在委託的要求下，她拿走了魔劍，使得她的丈夫竹藏在魔劍的詛咒中變成了石像。
不只如此，本應是最強戰士的蕾貝卡也喪失了強大的力量，變得無比弱小。卻多了能夠看到男人們色情等級的奇怪能力。
在男人們對她豐滿軀體的覬覦中，蕾貝卡究竟能不能順利解開身上的詛咒呢───

✤遊戲內容✤

▲ 本作是一邊探索廣大地圖一邊推進主線劇情的色情RPG。

可以在迷宮或野外按下確定鍵揮劍打倒敵人。

隨時可以從選單畫面確認接下來的目的地，不必擔心會卡關。

除此之外，隨著劇情推進，也可以獲得大陸地圖。
 

▲ 可以在曾經到過的地方之間進行快速傳送，讓探索變得更加順利。
 

▲ 城鎮、村莊、野外和迷宮……在各種地方都有可能發生色情事件。
 

▲ 從色情事件中獲得的「興奮」可以強化「淫呪魔劍」。

BOSS戰會切換成一般的回合制戰鬥，可以享受蕾貝卡衣服破損或被性騷擾的樣子。
 

▲ 可以在回想房間內確認是否有漏掉沒解鎖的色情事件。

 

✤等待著蕾貝卡的種種色情事件✤

・在酒館被男人噴灑股間液體的人妻戰士……

・被偶然遇見的男人委託偷窺他們夫妻做愛，卻在偷窺中逐漸興奮起來……

・在寒冷的村莊中被陌生男人懇求用胸部溫暖他……

・在旅館的大通鋪中被其他住客不斷刺激乳房，最後甚至開始主動期待起被襲擊的人妻女戰士……

・因為從小一起長大的討厭男人的粗暴抽插太舒服，所以不禁嘗試了口交、肛交，最後甚至還在丈夫的身旁……

・在去丈夫的診所幫忙時，為了替老人把尿，不得已只好幫老人握住了肉棒……

・原最強女戰士為了讓攔路的男人讓開，只能給他看了自己的內褲……

・酩酊大醉的已婚女戰士被眾多酒客襲擊玩了素股PLAY，卻在意識回籠後因為快感而上癮……

・村裡莫名被建了以自己為原型的色情雕像，見男人們每晚都對著它嚕管，女戰士也跟著興奮起來……

・參加了好老婆選拔競賽，將棒狀物夾在乳房中口交，雙手接住精液飲下……

・上半身卡在寶箱怪中時，露在外面的下體被路過的冒險者們為所欲為……

・為了在孕婦專門風俗工作，主動去被中出的不貞人妻……

・為了獲得情報，只好幫人含肉棒的人妻戰士……

・為了得到高報酬委託，女戰士被公會長要求替他乳交……

・應聘了富豪的女僕工作，但工作內容卻是肛門開發、香腸抽插小穴……！？

・接下了送鹽的任務卻在路途中被偷，只好接受委託人舔腋下的要求……

・付錢去女性用風俗店讓人手淫、69，並在快感中逐漸沉迷……

・在治安極差的地方被髒臭的大叔們將全身上下的穴都幹了一遍，曾是最強的女戰士卻不知為何無法抵抗……

・突然被路人強吻的人妻女戰士……

data.short_description: 最強女戰士蕾貝卡又被詛咒了？！這次是人妻？！ 握緊能將性經驗轉化成力量的魔劍，展開新的冒險吧！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Rebecca and the Sword of Mystery
data.detailed_description:
✤Story✤

After the female warrior Rebecca saved the village from the thieves, she lived a stable life in the village with her gentle husband and son.

One day, Rebecca received a certain commission from the guild. At the request of the commission, she took away the magic sword, causing her husband Takezo to turn into a stone statue under the curse of the magic sword.

Not only that, Rebecca, who was supposed to be the strongest warrior, also lost her great power and became extremely weak. But she has the strange ability to see the H levels of men.

With men coveting her plump body, can Rebecca successfully break the curse on her body───

  

✤Game Content✤

▲This is an erotic RPG that advances the main plot while exploring a vast map.

You can press the confirm button in a maze or in the wild to swing your sword to defeat the enemy.

You can confirm your next destination from the menu screen at any time without worrying about getting stuck.

In addition, as the plot progresses, you can also obtain continent maps.

 

▲You can quickly teleport between places you have visited, making exploration smoother.

 

▲ Towns, villages, wilderness and mazes... H events can happen in all kinds of places.

 

▲ The "excitement" gained from H events can strengthen the "cursed sword".

The BOSS battle will switch to a normal turn-based battle, and you can enjoy the appearance of Rebecca's clothes being torn or being sexually harassed.

 

▲ You can check in the memory room whether you have missed any H events that have not been unlocked.

 

✤All kinds of H events waiting for Rebecca✤

・A married warrior who was sprayed with fluid by a man in a tavern...

・She was entrusted by a man she met by chance to spy on their couple having sex, but she gradually became excited while peeping...

・Being begged by a strange man in a cold village to warm him with her breasts...

・The female warrior whose breasts were constantly stimulated by other guests in the hotel finally began to actively look forward to being attacked...

・The rough thrusting of the man she had hated since childhood was too comfortable, so she couldn't help but try oral sex, anal sex, and finally even did it next to her husband...

・When she went to her husband's clinic to help, in order to help the old man pee, she had no choice but to help the old man hold his cock...

・In order to get out of the way of the man blocking her way, the former strongest female warrior could only show him her underwear...

・A drunken married female warrior was attacked by many drunkards and played raw pussy PLAY, but after regaining consciousness she became addicted to the pleasure...

・A lewd statue based on herself was built in the village somehow. Seeing the men jerking at it every night, the female warrior also became excited...

・She participated in a good wife selection competition, put a cock in her breast and gave oral sex, caught the semen with her hands and drank it...

・When her upper body was stuck in the Mimic, the exposed lower body was used by the passing adventurers to do whatever they wanted...

・An unchaste wife took the initiative to get creampied in order to work at a sex shop specializing in pregnant women...

・In order to obtain information, the married woman warrior had no choice but to suck someone's cock...

・In order to get a high-paying commission, the female warrior was asked by the guild leader to breastfeed him...

・She applied for a job as a maid for a rich man, but the job content was to develop anus and insert sausage into pussy...! ?

・She accepted the task of delivering salt but was stolen on the way, so she had to accept the client's request to lick her armpits...

・She paid money to go to a sex shop for women to be fingered and have 69, and gradually became addicted to the pleasure...

・The married woman warrior who was suddenly forcibly kissed by a passerby...

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
